## Summary

What changed?

## Why

What Axiom capability, validation, generator, documentation, or example problem does this address?

## Verification

- [ ] `node --test`
- [ ] relevant `axiom validate ...` commands
- [ ] generated artifacts inspected when generator output changed
- [ ] docs updated when behavior or syntax changed

## Scope Check

- [ ] This keeps the first-run experience simple.
- [ ] This does not imply production security guarantees Axiom does not provide.
- [ ] This avoids broad framework generation unless the contract behavior is already proven.
